player_notes.victor wembanyama: Out (concussion) for Game 3 vs. Blazers; status for Game 4 unknown — monitor closely. His absence elevated Castle and Harper's roles significantly.
player_notes.kevin durant: Out for Lakers vs. Rockets Game 3; remains out heading into Game 4 — major usage boost for remaining Rockets scorers.
player_notes.austin reaves: Out for Lakers vs. Rockets Game 3; monitor availability for Game 4 — minutes redistributed among Lakers guards.
player_notes.joel embiid: Out (appendectomy) for 76ers vs. Celtics Game 3; availability for Game 4 uncertain — significant negative impact on PHI rebounding and scoring props.
player_notes.immanuel quickley: Out for remainder of Raptors vs. Cavaliers series (aggravated hamstring strain) — boosts usage for Barrett, Barnes, and other Raptors guards.
player_notes.mikal bridges: Scoreless and benched for most of the second half in Knicks' Game 3 loss; role reduction risk for Game 4 — confidence in pts/3PM props lowered.
player_notes.stephon castle: Stepped into starting/featured role with Wembanyama out, scoring a game-high 33 in Game 3 — elevated props if Wemby remains out for Game 4.
player_notes.lebron james: Scored 29 pts including clutch tying 3 in regulation; active and performing at high level with Rockets missing Durant — strong prop confidence.
player_notes.jayson tatum: 25 pts in Game 3 win; continuing strong production in return from injury — prop confidence high.
player_notes.jaylen brown: 25 pts in Game 3 win — solid role and usage confirmed, props remain reliable.
player_notes.rj barrett: Career playoff-high 33 pts in Game 3 rout with Quickley out for series — increased usage expected, positive prop outlook.
player_notes.scottie barnes: Career playoff-high 33 pts and 11 assists in Game 3 with Quickley out — expect elevated role for remainder of series.

game_notes.LAL vs HOU: Kevin Durant (out) and Austin Reaves (out) both missed Game 4 — significant rotation implications for both sides. Rockets players face increased pressure with Durant sidelined.
game_notes.SAS vs POR: Victor Wembanyama (concussion) out for Game 3; Game 4 availability unknown — Castle and Harper/bench players see major minute and usage spikes if he remains out.
game_notes.BOS vs PHI: Joel Embiid (appendectomy) missed Game 3 and status for Game 4 is uncertain — deflates 76ers big man prop options and boosts Celtics frontcourt rebound props.
game_notes.CLE vs TOR: Immanuel Quickley ruled out for entire series (hamstring) — expect Barrett and Barnes to sustain elevated usage and stat lines for remaining games.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Immanuel Quickley (TOR) — Right hamstring tightness... Day-to-day — monitor for G3 (Apr 23 at Toronto). TOR guard rotation without Quickley relies on Barrett + Shead.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News confirms Quickley aggravated his strained right hamstring and will NOT be available for the remainder of Toronto's first-round series against Cleveland — no longer day-to-day, now out for the entire series.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Upgrade Quickley's status from 'day-to-day' to 'OUT for remainder of R1 vs CLE series.' Remove any monitoring language. Update TOR injury context to reflect that his absence is now confirmed for all remaining games in this series.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Damian Lillard (POR) — Achilles torn in 2025 playoffs. Out all season.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News reports that the Trail Blazers have 'not ruled Damian Lillard out from returning for the NBA playoffs,' per Ramona Shelburne — suggesting a potential return is at least being discussed, which directly conflicts with the 'Out all season' designation.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Remove Lillard from the confirmed season-ending absences list or add a caveat that POR has not officially ruled him out for the playoffs. Flag for immediate monitoring — if cleared, this would be a major roster development affecting SAS vs POR series props and POR player role context.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: LAL vs HOU G3 diary: 'Durant was ruled OUT again (ankle injury, now listed QUES)'
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News confirms Durant was downgraded from questionable to OUT before Game 3 — the 'QUES' tag in the game diary should be updated to reflect he is OUT for G3 (already played) and his status for G4 remains the key variable. The news also confirms this is an ankle injury specifically.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update G3 diary and injury landscape to confirm Durant was OUT for G3 with ankle injury (not merely 'ruled OUT again, listed QUES'). Clarify his G4 status as unknown pending further updates. The G3 diary already reflects the DNP result correctly, but the injury landscape entry should be updated from 'QUES' to 'OUT G3, G4 TBD (ankle).'

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Austin Reaves (LAL) — Grade 2 oblique strain... 'out for the majority of the first-round series; earliest first week of May.' 12-25% reinjury risk if rushed.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News confirms Reaves was downgraded from questionable to OUT before Game 3 — consistent with existing context, but the news confirms he remains OUT through at least G3. No new return timeline information, but the downgrade from QUES to OUT is a confirmatory data point.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update injury landscape to note Reaves was officially confirmed OUT for G3 (downgraded from QUES). Status for G4 remains per existing timeline estimate (earliest first week of May). No fundamental change to the existing assessment needed.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Player note describes Alexander-Walker's career playoff history and production context, referencing his 20.8 PPG regular season average. No mention of any individual awards.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News reports Alexander-Walker was named this season's Most Improved Player — a significant individual award not reflected anywhere in the season context document. This is relevant context for his role/performance narrative and confirms his breakout season was league-recognized.

Note it is 'the second straight Atlanta Hawks player to win the award.' This does not change his playoff prop treatment but is relevant biographical/contextual information for analysts.

suggested_context_updates.player_or_team: TOR vs CLE — Game 3 score discrepancy
suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Game 3 (Apr 23) diary entry: 'TOR 126, CLE 104 | CLE leads 2-1' — Barnes 33/5/11, Barrett 33/5/5 (12-19 FG, 6 3PM)
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News headline states 'Barnes, Barrett each score 33 as Raptors beat Cavaliers 126-104' and describes Barrett adding 'a career playoff-high 33 points' — consistent with context. However, news also states 'Scottie Barnes set career playoff highs with 33 points and 11 assists' — the 11 assists figure for Barnes matches the context (11 AST), confirming accuracy. No direct conflict found on scores or stat lines.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: No update needed — news confirms existing G3 diary facts. Barnes 33/11 AST and Barrett 33/6 3PM are confirmed. Retain existing diary entry as accurate.
